title: Nersa’s mistakes turn 5.36% tariff increase into 8.76%
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - Consumers’ fears came true this weekend when energy regulator Nersa confirmed that Eskom’s average tariffs will increase by 8.76% this year, instead of the 5.36% initially announced more than a year ago.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - Consumers’ fears came true this weekend when energy regulator Nersa confirmed that Eskom’s average tariffs will increase by 8.76% this year, instead of the 5.36% initially announced more than a year ago."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This follows the redetermination of Eskom’s revenue to correct earlier mistakes made by Nersa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The increase will take effect on 1 April for those buying electricity directly from Eskom and on 1 July for municipal customers.","html":"The increase will take effect on 1 April for those buying electricity directly from Eskom and on 1 July for municipal customers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"2027 tariff increase"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Next year, the increase will amount to 8.83% instead of the initial 6.19%, as the additional R54 billion in revenue Nersa awarded Eskom over the weekend is phased in.","html":"Next year, the increase will amount to 8.83% instead of the initial 6.19%, as the additional R54 billion in revenue Nersa awarded Eskom over the weekend is phased in."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A further R19.7 will be carried over to future increases.","html":"A further R19.7 will be carried over to future increases."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Picture: Nersa","html":" Picture: Nersa "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This article was republished from Moneyweb. Read the original here.","html":"This article was republished from Moneyweb. Read the original here."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on the Caxton publication, The Citizen","html":"Read more on the Caxton publication, The Citizen"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
